title: erigeron angustifolius
intro: Erigeron angustifolius, also known as Narrowleaf Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving symptoms of digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. Erigeron angustifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications like salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
